channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Witness claims Feroz Khan misled police panel during 2021 cocaine seizure investigation
item.description: A witness at the Madlanga commission of inquiry has alleged that Maj-Gen Feroz Khan, head of police counter-intelligence, misled an internal disciplinary panel led by Lt-Gen Nhlahla Mkhwanazi, which c...

item.title: Kanini Kega Pays Tribute to His Mother Days Before Her Passing
item.description: EALA MP Kanini Kega emotionally recounted the final days of his mother, Annah Ndung'u, who passed away suddenly at the age of 83. Kega described her struggle with dementia, noting that despite occasio...

item.title: AbdulRazaq tells APC aspirants their efforts dey appreciated ahead of Kwara primaries
item.description: Kwara State Governor, AbdulRahman AbdulRazaq, don yan all APC aspirants say dem na winners, even if dem no fit carry ticket for the upcoming primaries. The governor yan this one during meeting with AP...

item.title: FHA begins construction of 195 new housing units in Ogun State under Tinubu’s directive
item.description: For Ogun State, housing dey finally get correct push as Federal Housing Authority (FHA) don start construction of FHA Gateway Estate for Ofada, Obafemi Owode Local Government Area. The groundbreaking ...

item.title: Labor’s tax reforms aim to address intergenerational inequity in property investment
item.description: The 2026 federal budget has sparked debate over changes to capital gains, negative gearing, and trust taxation. These policies, historically favouring older, asset-rich Australians, have been modestly...

item.title: Supreme Court Questions Role of Cabinet Minister in Selection Panel for Chief Election Commissioner Appointments
item.description: The Supreme Court of India on Thursday expressed serious concerns over the current mechanism for appointing the Chief Election Commissioner and other Election Commissioners. The bench pointed out that...

item.title: Kenya: No Evidence President Ruto Made Threatening Remarks in Viral Graphic
item.description: A fake graphic claiming that President William Ruto made inflammatory remarks threatening other ethnic communities ahead of the 2027 general elections is circulating widely on social media. The graphi...

item.title: IMF Approves Funding for Tanzania with Positive Economic Forecast for 2026
item.description: During Week 12 of 2026, the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) experienced mixed trading activity. Equity turnover dropped significantly by 36.13%, reaching TZS 27.26 billion, while share volume fell ...

item.title: Tanzania expands use of AI to improve disaster preparedness and response
item.description: Tanzania has announced a strong commitment to integrate Artificial Intelligence (AI) into its disaster management systems as part of broader efforts to improve early warning, preparedness, and respons...

item.title: Labour and Compliance Challenges in South Africa's Clothing Manufacturing Sector
item.description: South Africa's clothing manufacturing sector, particularly in Newcastle, is facing serious challenges regarding labour compliance. A high-profile case against Drake Clothing alleges the use of sweatsh...

item.title: Trump Faces Political and Social Challenges During Summer 2026 Amid World Events
item.description: As summer 2026 approaches, former President Donald Trump faces a confluence of challenges that could destabilize his political standing and the national mood. Rising costs, an ongoing war, declining p...

item.title: Gwadar University VC and Pro-Vice Chancellor Unaccounted for During Trip to Quetta
item.description: The Vice Chancellor of Gwadar University, Dr Abdul Razzaq Sabir, and Pro-Vice Chancellor Syed Manzoor Ahmed have gone missing while travelling from Gwadar to Quetta. According to officials, the two un...

item.title: Interior Ministry directs NCCIA to probe Cambridge exam paper leak
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Ministry of Interior has directed the National Cyber Crime Investigation Agency (NCCIA) to conduct a thorough investigation into the alleged leak of Cambridge examination papers. This s...

item.title: Adamawa Pilgrims Stranded in Saudi Arabia Over Accommodation Issues Despite Paying Full Hajj Fees
item.description: Plenty pilgrims from Adamawa State don find themselves stranded for Saudi Arabia during 2025 Hajj even after dem don pay over N8.3 million each for the pilgrimage. The affected people dem dey mainly f...

item.title: How to Claim Compensation for Pothole Damage on UK Roads
item.description: Potholes have become a growing problem on roads across the UK, with over one million reported, leading to substantial vehicle damage and costly repairs for motorists. A BBC investigation revealed that...

item.title: Supreme Court Addresses Estate Dispute Between Priya Kapur and Rani Kapur
item.description: The Supreme Court of India recently addressed a legal dispute concerning the estate of the late industrialist Sunjay Kapur. During proceedings, Rani Kapur highlighted the complexity of the estate mana...

item.title: Podcaster Andrew Schulz Criticizes CNN Commentator Scott Jennings for Defending Trump
item.description: CNN commentator Scott Jennings faced sharp criticism from comedian and former Trump supporter Andrew Schulz this week over his perceived overzealous defense of former President Donald Trump. Schulz, w...

item.title: Democrats Warn of Conflict of Interest as Trump Administration Considers Settling $10 Billion IRS Lawsuit
item.description: Democrats in Congress are raising alarms over a potential settlement in a $10 billion lawsuit filed by President Donald Trump, his sons, and the Trump Organization against the IRS. The suit stems from...

item.title: Registrar of Political Parties Demands CHADEMA Explain Statements to Avoid Suspension or Fine
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The Office of the Registrar of Political Parties in Tanzania has formally warned the opposition party CHADEMA over statements made by its leaders, saying they could breach the Politica...

item.title: Government Plans AI Tools to Strengthen Tax Compliance in Budget 2026-27
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The government held a special session on Wednesday to review new tax enforcement measures for the upcoming federal budget 2026-27. The meeting, chaired by Economic Affairs Minister Ahad Che...
